title: alchemilla palmata subsp. acutangula
intro: Alchemilla palmata subsp. acutangula, also known as the lady's mantle or maiden's tears, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is a perennial herb with serrated leaves and small white or yellowish flowers, traditionally used in herbal medicine. The medicinal properties of Alchemilla palmata subsp. acutangula include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and astringent properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is believed to provide health benefits such as soothing menstrual cramps, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing.
